title: selaginella fuertesii
intro: Selaginella fuertesii, also known as Puerto Rican spikemoss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of small, non-vascular plants often referred to as spikemosses or resurrection ferns. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella fuertesii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Selaginella fuertesii can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
